body:
# PULL REQUEST

## Purpose and Content
    (1) Remove @show statements
    (2) Update solver function to avoid entering iterative loop in neutral
    conditions
    (3) Update exchange coefficients to avoid iterative loop in neutral
    conditions
    (4) Update convergence coverage checks to maintain physically reasonable ratio of z0m/z0b
    (5) Return FT(Inf) in neutral conditions
            modified:   src/SurfaceFluxes.jl
            modified:   test/runtests.jl
            modified:   test/test_convergence.jl
    + Format

Refactors test (add F64 checks), removes unnecessary function imports from Thermodynamics->TestedProfiles, clears code duplication,re-enable GPU checks, increase coverage of convergence checks. 

## Benefits and Risks
Risks: Package requires further physics checks and tests in breaking edge cases ("data-tests" similar to Thermodynamics.jl will be added when such cases are discovered in integration tests with TC.jl and ClimaAtmos.jl)
title: remove @show and make print conditional
